title: PS-69533: Angular unit test for drawing-version-panel component
body: PS-69533: Angular unit test for drawing-version-panel component
author: abarati

review_comments.body: Since this is required cleanup, it may be good to wrap everything below the `appendChild` in a `try {} finally {}` with `removeChild` in the finally
review_comments.author: henrykaus

review_comments.body: When PR #11031 is merged, these 2 lines (and all of the other references below can be replaced with `await detectChangesAndWhenStable(fixture, true)`
review_comments.author: henrykaus

issue_comments.body:
Hi @ValdezAbel,

I added you as primary reviewer to this PR.
Please let our team knows anything that you feel necessary for us to consider in angular testing.

unfortunately, I ran out of copilot credits and can not add copilot reviewer!
Thanks
issue_comments.author: abarati
